verses.1: Hear this word that the LORD has spoken against you, children of Israel, against the whole family which I brought up out of the land of Egypt, saying:
verses.2: “I have only chosen you of all the families of the earth.
verses.4: Will a lion roar in the thicket,
verses.5: Can a bird fall in a trap on the earth,
verses.6: Does the trumpet alarm sound in a city,
verses.7: Surely the Lord GOD will do nothing,
verses.9: Proclaim in the palaces at Ashdod,
verses.10: “Indeed they don’t know to do right,” says the LORD,
verses.13: “Listen, and testify against the house of Jacob,” says the Lord GOD, the God of Armies.
verses.14: “For in the day that I visit the transgressions of Israel on him,
verses.15: I will strike the winter house with the summer house;
